song.title: Oh How I Need You
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Lord, I find You in the seeking, Lord, I find You in the doubt And to know You is to love You, And to know so little else
[C] Chorus Oh, I need You, Oh, how I need You Oh, how I need You, Oh, how I need You
[V2] 2) Lord, I find You in the morning, Lord, I seek You every day Let my life be for Your glory, Woven in Your threads of grace
[B1] Light, glorious light, I will go where You shine Break the dawn, Crack the skies, Make the way bright before me In Your light, I will find All I need, all I need is You
[E] 1) Lord, I find You in the seeking, Lord, I find You in the doubt And to know You is to love You, And to know so little else
Chorus Oh I need You, Oh how I need You Oh how I need You, Oh how I need You
2) Lord, I find You in the morning, Lord, I seek You every day Let my life be for Your glory, Woven in Your threads of grace
Bridge Light, glorious light, I will go where You shine Break the dawn, Crack the skies, Make the way bright before me In Your light, I will find All I need, all I need is You
